mnemonics.title: Eigen Definition记忆
mnemonics.content: EIGEN: 'I Generate' - Input vector generates output through scaling λ (Av = λv)

mnemonics.title: Characteristic Equation
mnemonics.content: CHARACTERISTIC: 'Come Home And Find The Eigen Roots In System Equation' - |A - λI| = 0 gives eigenvalues

acronyms.usage: Every matrix satisfies its own characteristic equation p(A) = 0
A = PDP⁻¹ where D is diagonal with eigenvalues
Uses eigenvalues/eigenvectors to reduce data dimensionality

visualTips.visualization: Think of eigenvector as an arrow that doesn't change direction under transformation, only scales. Like stretching a rubber sheet along specific directions.
Subtract λ from diagonal elements, take determinant, set to zero. Visual: diagonal becomes (a-λ, d-λ, g-λ) with cross terms subtracted.
Picture a 3D space where all vectors along a line through origin are eigenvectors - that's the eigenspace (a line through origin = 1D subspace).

analogies.analogy: Like the axis of rotation in spinning a wheel - the axis direction doesn't change, only spins in place.
Like the magnification factor in a zoom lens - how much the eigenvector gets stretched or compressed.
Like finding the natural coordinate system where the matrix acts simply as scaling along each axis.
Like having fewer independent stretching directions than dimensions - you can't fully decompose the transformation.
